_note: apps/local is the downloadable Express+WebSocket binary that ships to operator machines. It is NOT a Vercel serverless app. The Vercel target for this repo is apps/cloud. If Vercel auto-detected this directory, change Root Directory to apps/cloud or delete the project.
ignoreCommand: echo 'apps/local is a downloadable binary, not a Vercel app; deploy apps/cloud instead' && exit 1
